summary: Comprehensive testing of QRGate Timed Entry Features. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Checkout with slot selection, Dashboard Capacity, Dashboard Waitlist, Dashboard Tickets with timed entry toggle, Admin Analytics. All new features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All timed entry features implemented correctly
Slot availability API returns proper booking counts
Checkout correctly validates slot availability before booking
Dashboard Capacity page shows real-time slot availability
Dashboard Waitlist shows entries with manual notification capability
Scanner API returns slot_info for timed entry tickets
Admin analytics endpoint properly calculates platform-wide metrics
seed_data_creation: Terme di Caracalla venue with timed entry tickets configured. TEST_ tickets created during automated testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All timed entry features fully tested and working: 1) Timed Entry Tickets - checkbox toggle and slot configuration in Dashboard > Tickets, 2) Slot Selection API - GET /api/public/venue/{slug}/slots returns availability by date, 3) Checkout with slots - POST /api/public/checkout-session validates and books slots, 4) Dashboard Capacity - shows daily limit and per-slot availability by date, 5) Dashboard Waitlist - shows waiting list with manual notification, 6) Waitlist Join API - POST /api/public/waitlist/join works correctly, 7) Scanner - shows slot_info in scan result, 8) Dashboard Analytics - GET /api/dashboard/analytics returns comprehensive venue stats, 9) Admin Analytics - GET /api/admin/analytics returns platform-wide metrics (superadmin only), 10) Daily Capacity - venue-level daily limit configurable in Dashboard > Capacity.

features_tested.timed_entry_tickets_api: PASS - POST /api/dashboard/tickets/timed creates tickets with slots
features_tested.dashboard_capacity: PASS - Shows daily capacity and per-slot availability with date navigation
features_tested.dashboard_waitlist: PASS - Shows waitlist entries with notify/delete actions
features_tested.scanner_slot_info: PASS - POST /api/scan/verify returns slot_info for timed tickets
features_tested.admin_analytics: PASS - GET /api/admin/analytics returns platform metrics (403 for non-superadmin)
features_tested.daily_capacity: PASS - Daily limit toggle and configuration working
features_tested.checkout_ui_slot_selection: PASS - Date picker and time slot buttons work correctly
features_tested.ticket_form_timed_entry_toggle: PASS - Checkbox with clock icon and slot configuration UI
